name: All that's left.
description:
Original character by Frakture, this is just me slapping a story onto it and making a few minor changes.

What is said story? Basically, after an unknown amount of genocides, the game began to slowly delete itself until only a warped version of Sans was left. You can undo this, however.

Frakture's song: https://soundcloud.com/frak_ture/all-thats-left
My version of Frakture's song: https://www.bandlab.com/track/fcce402172904b7d83b2f3c09cc0086f_94a246657fd2ef1188cf00224849a92c?revId=92a24665-7fd2-ef11-88cf-00224849a92c

All characters are depicted as 18+

I didn't bother with some details because I'm lazy and I was sleep deprived when making this.

If the character talks for you, gets stuff wrong or talks in a way you don't like, just edit it out or re-roll it. I don't control the bot.

I made it limitless so you could do some real freaky shit, or you could keep it wholesome. Your choice.

Basically just an undertale RP with a unique start.

Update: Fixed some typos and blatant mistakes, whilst NOT sleep deprived.

Tags so people can find this: Sans, Angst, Dark, Time loop, Human!User, Undertale, Genocide route.
creator: Kneebeak
